title: Unseen World
description: Unseen World, world of darkness, are waiting for you
body:
![Title](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/550263/description_19f8be2b-93bb-4109-9c68-b35e9152eac8.png)

![Separator](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/550263/description_29200dc3-c262-48a3-9442-e1149ceb0f63.png)

## About:

# Unseen World - The Chimeric Darkness
Chimeric Darkness - dark version of overworld, where sun never rises, dimension where water is dark, and hazards are everywhere, but even here you can find friends

![Separator](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/550263/description_29200dc3-c262-48a3-9442-e1149ceb0f63.png)

![Biomes image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/550263/description_5cdcff42-cbb5-42c1-85ff-c5e71e596956.png)

Biomes in Chimeric Darkness are cold and hot, dark and light, with thematic soundtracks, mobs and dungeons 

![Separator](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/550263/description_29200dc3-c262-48a3-9442-e1149ceb0f63.png)

![Structures image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/550263/description_36c0acd6-ab5e-421b-97a2-6466bb0b6e64.png)

Dungeons, structures and buildings! A lot of dungeons Unseen World adds, above and underground, big and small that gives new massive expirience

![Separator](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/550263/description_29200dc3-c262-48a3-9442-e1149ceb0f63.png)

🟢 **Project Status**: on process of porting to Fabric | fully remake

📝Current roadmap for versions:

- ~~Port of mod to 1.20.1 for Fabric, coming September of 2024~~
- ~~Port of mod to Fabric / Neoforge 1.21.1, coming once 1.21.1 is out and is stable~~

![Separator](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/550263/description_29200dc3-c262-48a3-9442-e1149ceb0f63.png)

📖 **DEPENDENCIES + COMPATIBILITIES:**

**Unseen World requires: **

AniTexLib 0.4+: anitexlib (since v3.5 and only for forge / neoforge)

To upgrade your game experience with mod recommend use also:

Better Combat: better-combat-by-daedelus

**You have an idea or you found a bug? Report it here:**
